leadText: The Jade Orb (Japanese: もえぎいろのたま Verdant Orb) is a Key Item introduced in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver. It is a legendary artifact that is associated with Rayquaza.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Jade Orb is required to encounter Rayquaza in the Embedded Tower .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method HG SS Professor Oak's Laboratory (from Professor Oak if he is shown a Kyogre from HeartGold and a Groudon from SoulSilver )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description HG SS B W B2 W2 A shiny green orb that is said to have a legend and has a deep connection with the Hoenn region. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A shiny green orb that is said to have a legend tied to it. It's known to have a deep connection with the Hoenn region. S V ZA A shiny green orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.
